title: ocotea valerioana
intro: Ocotea valerioana, also known as Costa Rican sandalwood, is a tropical tree native to Costa Rica, belonging to the Lauraceae family. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Ocotea valerioana include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Ocotea valerioana include essential oils, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
